title: House approves tentative labor deal to avoid rail strike
text: The House passed legislation Wednesday that would force a tentative rail labor agreement and thwart a national strike.

title: Union Pacific Corporation (UNP) Presents at Credit Suisse's 10th Annual Global Industrials Conference (Transcript)
text: Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE:UNP ) Credit Suisse's 10th Annual Global Industrials Conference November 30, 2022 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Jennifer Hamann - CFO Conference Call Participants Ariel Rosa - Credit Suisse Ariel Rosa Okay. Great. Good morning, everyone.

title: Full Steam Ahead: Freight Railroads Likely To Return To Service For The Holidays
text: There has been a threat of a freight railroad strike since early September. Railroads offer a unique combination of fuel efficiency and capacity, and there is no perfect substitute (especially with the current truck driver shortage).

title: Railroads, unions draw their lines in sand after Biden urges Congress to prevent strike
text: With President Biden urging Congress to prevent a rail strike, both rails and unions are drawing their lines in the sand on labor deal terms and consequences.

title: Railroad stocks rally as strike risk effectively removed after President Biden urged Congress to step in
text: Shares of railroad operators rallied Tuesday, as Evercore ISI analyst Jonathan Chappell said President Joe Biden's urging of Congress to step into the stalled talks between labor unions and rail operators effectively removes the risk of a strike. Biden's urging comes after a coalition of more than 400 business groups sent a letter asking congressional leaders to step get involved to avert a strike, which many believe would have devastating effects on the U.S. economy.

title: 4 Railroad Stocks to Capitalize on Strong Freight Demand
text: The Zacks Transportation - Rail industry is gaining from a favorable freight environment. This bodes well for stocks like UNP, CP, CSX and NSC.

title: Union Pacific's (UNP) Dividends a Savior, Cost Woes Sting
text: Union Pacific's (UNP) shareholder-friendly measures underpin its financial flexibility. However, high operating costs on account of steep fuel expenses are denting its bottom line.

title: If train strike happens, major rail union will honor picket lines, its' leader says
text: Brotherhood of Locomotive Engineers and Trainmen National President Dennis Pierce provides expert analysis of railroad workers' potential 2022 train strike.

title: Union Pacific Corporation CFO Jennifer Hamann to Address the Credit Suisse 10th Annual Global Industrials Conference
text: OMAHA, Neb., Nov. 23, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jennifer Hamann, executive vice president and chief financial officer of Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP), will address the Credit Suisse 10th Annual Global Industrials Conference on Wednesday, Nov. 30, 2022, at 8 a.m.

title: Union Pacific CEO called to hearing in Washington as risk of rail strike rises
text: Union Pacific's CEO and top executives are called to a hearing in the nation's capital over use of embargos to slow freight rail as a rail strike looms.

title: 2 'Must Own' Dividend Growth Stocks I'm Aggressively Adding To
text: After discussing two stocks that I wouldn't buy, it's time to discuss two companies that I believe make for tremendous investments during recession weakness. I believe there's a big chance of more market weakness and a prolonged sideways trend. Hence, I'm looking for quality stocks with great dividend growth fundamentals.

title: Rail union strike would create a ‘crippling' economy, industry official warns
text: Association of American Railroads CEO Ian Jeffries says major rails are "ready, willing and able" to reach new negotiations and avoid creating a "crippling economy" with a strike.

title: With a strike looming, railroad unions and management head back to negotiating table
text: With a crippling freight rail strike looming in two weeks, leaders of four railroad unions and management of the major US freight railroads are due back at the negotiating table Tuesday afternoon.

title: Another rail union rejects deal, escalating strike threat ahead of holidays
text: A fourth rail union rejected a deal with major freight railroads over the weekend, elevating the threat of a nationwide strike ahead of the holiday season.

title: If rail strike begins, 'I think every union' will honor picket line, says BLET president
text: BLET president Dennis Pierce says his rail members, and every union, will honor the picket line if a freight strike begins Dec. 5.

title: Retailers warn of 'self-inflicted economic disaster' after largest rail union rejects labor deal
text: The nation's leading retailers warned Monday that Congress may need to step in to avert a devastating freight rail strike they fear could spoil food, interrupt the delivery of goods bought online and worsen inflation.

title: America faces a possible rail strike in two weeks after largest union rejects labor deal
text: America faces a growing risk of a crippling national freight rail strike in two weeks. The rank-and-file members of the nation's largest rail union, which represents the industry's conductors, rejected a tentative labor deal with freight railroads, the union announced Monday...

title: Key railroad union rejects contract as strike looms
text: One of two of the country's largest railroad unions said Monday their members voted to reject a new wage deal brokered by the White House, moving closer to a labor strike that could disrupt some supply chains as soon as early December.

title: Railroad Unions Split Over Labor Contract
text: Members of the conductors union narrowly voted to reject a new wage deal brokered by the White House, while the engineers union narrowly ratified the deal.

title: Key Union Votes Down Freight Rail Contract, Making Strike More Likely
text: The tentative agreement, brokered in September with help from the Biden administration, had averted a strike before the midterm elections.

title: Large rail union SMART-TD votes to reject labor deal as national strike moves closer
text: SMART-TD, one of the largest rail unions, voted down a labor deal and a national strike could begin in December, a serious blow to the economy.

title: With U.S. economy at risk, here's how a national rail strike could start in December
text: Key rail union votes and decisions are coming as UPS, retailers, and the U.S. economy prepare for a potential strike that could shut down the freight network.

title: Union Pacific Details Efforts to Address Climate Change; Becomes First U.S. Railroad to Support Task Force on Climate-Related Financial Disclosures
text: Results from the railroad's first long-term climate scenario analysis support plan to achieve net-zero greenhouse gas emissions by 2050. OMAHA, Neb.

title: Union Pacific Adds Environmental Sustainability as Philanthropic Priority
text: The Nature Conservancy Selected for Freshwater and Restoration Collaboration OMAHA, Neb. , Nov. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific Railroad is adding Environmental Sustainability as a fourth pillar for its Community Ties Giving Program, extending the company's bold commitment to reducing the impacts of climate change and building a more sustainable economy to its community investments.

title: Slew of Solid Q3 Earnings Pushes Transport ETFs Higher
text: Transport sector is the second-biggest contributor to Q3 earnings and the third-largest contributor to revenue growth so far.
